text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I bid you good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm ever so grateful for the time off you granted
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I mended my dolls' clothing and enjoyed a
carefree day on my terms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But now it's time to flip my mood switch and go
zoooom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro Bright made the most of her
time off.
